item.buildtools.selection_staff.tooltip: Left-click block: set first point. Right-click block: set second point. Sneak right-click: open mode menu.
item.buildtools.advanced_selection_staff: Click or aim to add points up to 100 blocks away. Sneak left-click removes one point. Sneak-scroll while aiming at a point changes its order.
item.buildtools.builder_wand.tooltip: Right-click previews/builds with offhand blocks. Left-click block opens builder menu.
item.buildtools.advanced_builder_wand.to: Right-click previews/builds with filters, gradients, weighted random patterns, and plans. Left-click block opens builder menu.
item.buildtools.builder_brush.tooltip: Right-click previews/paints brush shapes. Left-click block opens brush menu.
item.buildtools.area_breaker.tooltip: Right-click previews/removes the selected area. With an Undo or Redo Token, drops are stored in history.
item.buildtools.blueprint_trowel.tooltip: Right-click copies or sneak-pastes blueprints. Left-click block opens copy/paste controls.
item.buildtools.undo_token.tooltip: Right-click to undo your most recent operation. Left-click block opens undo menu.
item.buildtools.redo_token.tooltip: Right-click to redo your most recently undone operation. Left-click block opens redo menu.
item.buildtools.magnet.tooltip: While in your inventory, nearby dropped items go straight into your inventory.
item.buildtools.storage_link.tooltip: One-use tool that marks a storage block as your BuildTools building storage. Limit: 10.
buildtools.mode.fill.description: Places only in air or replaceable blocks.
buildtools.mode.replace.description: Replaces only blocks matching the picked replace target.
buildtools.mode.overwrite.description: Breaks existing blocks, then places the offhand block.
buildtools.brush.sphere.description: Paints a round volume into air and replaceable blocks.
buildtools.brush.cylinder.description: Paints a flat round disk at the clicked height.
buildtools.brush.smooth.description: Levels nearby terrain toward the average height.
buildtools.brush.replace.description: Replaces blocks matching the current replace target.
buildtools.menu.title: BuildTools Modes
buildtools.menu.materials.description: Updates outline and actionbar material counts.
buildtools.menu.save_preset.description: Stores this selection size and shape as your favorite preset.
buildtools.menu.load_preset.description: Loads your saved preset at your feet.
buildtools.menu.save_plan.description: Stores the current wand result as a ghost plan without spending blocks.
buildtools.menu.build_plan.description: Builds your saved plan and charges materials.
buildtools.menu.brush_mode.description: Selects how the brush affects blocks.
buildtools.menu.gradient.description: Uses the palette as an ordered gradient.
buildtools.menu.gradient_direction.descr: Cycles gradient direction between X, Y, Z, and point order.
buildtools.menu.random_pattern.descripti: Uses weighted palette blocks as a deterministic random pattern.
buildtools.menu.clear_selection.descript: Clears the current selection and preview.
buildtools.menu.copy_blueprint.descripti: Copies the current selection into the trowel clipboard.
buildtools.menu.paste_blueprint_here.des: Previews the copied blueprint with Pos 1 at your feet.
buildtools.menu.paste_blueprint_selectio: Previews the copied blueprint at the current selection's first point.
buildtools.menu.confirm_paste.descriptio: Builds the currently previewed blueprint paste.
buildtools.menu.cancel_paste.description: Clears the current blueprint paste preview.
buildtools.menu.undo.description: Undoes the most recent BuildTools operation.
buildtools.menu.redo.description: Redoes the most recently undone BuildTools operation.
buildtools.menu.replace_palette.descript: Add up to 10 blocks for replace filters, gradients, and weighted patterns.
buildtools.menu.palette_weight.descripti: Scroll to change weight. Shift-scroll changes by 10.
buildtools.menu.return_palette.descripti: Returns stored palette blocks and clears the palette.
buildtools.menu.nudge.description: Moves the whole selection one block.
buildtools.menu.nudge_paste.description: Moves the current paste preview one block.
buildtools.menu.expand.description: Adds one block to this side of the selection.
buildtools.menu.shrink.description: Removes one block from this side of the selection.
buildtools.menu.rotate_blueprint.descrip: Rotates the copied blueprint 90 degrees around Y.
buildtools.menu.rotate_selection.descrip: Rotates the selected area around Pos 1.
buildtools.menu.mirror_blueprint.descrip: Mirrors the copied blueprint before paste.
buildtools.message.advanced_point_order_: Advanced point is already at slot %s.
buildtools.message.applied_collected: Applied %s block changes and stored %s drops in history.
buildtools.message.stored_drops_collecte: Collected %s stored drops and cleared undo/redo history.
buildtools.message.paste_preview: Previewing %s paste blocks. Sneak right-click the same spot again to confirm.
buildtools.error.dimension_mismatch: That selection belongs to another dimension.
buildtools.error.offhand_block: Put the block to place in your offhand.
buildtools.error.unsupported_block: That block cannot be placed by BuildTools.
buildtools.error.copy_unsupported: Blueprints cannot copy fluids or block entities in v1.
buildtools.error.no_undo: There is no BuildTools operation to undo.
buildtools.error.no_redo: There is no BuildTools operation to redo.
buildtools.error.no_stored_drops: There are no stored drops to collect.
buildtools.error.not_storage: That block is not a storage block.
buildtools.error.storage_limit: You can only link %s BuildTools storages.
buildtools.error.no_advanced_point: Aim at an advanced point first.
buildtools.error.out_of_world: Selection includes blocks outside the world.
buildtools.error.protected_state: BuildTools skips fluids and block entities in v1.
buildtools.configuration.title: BuildTools Configs
